name: polinko-dev
postCreateCommand: /bin/bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; VENV_DIR=polinko-repositioning-system; rm -rf "$VENV_DIR"; python3 -m venv --copies "$VENV_DIR"; if [ ! -x "$VENV_DIR/bin/python3" ]; then echo "Expected venv interpreter missing: $VENV_DIR/bin/python3"; exit 1; fi; "$VENV_DIR/bin/python3" -m pip install --upgrade pip; "$VENV_DIR/bin/python3" -m pip install -r requirements.lock; ln -sfn "$VENV_DIR" venv; ln -sfn "$VENV_DIR" virtualenv_name; npm install -g npm@latest --no-fund --no-audit; hash -r; cd frontend; npm ci --no-audit --no-fund'
